reviews.review_description: The game doesn't work.. I tried to launch it and the screen went black and stayed that way. I had to take my phone out of the headset just to be able to go back to the home screen. HIGHLY DISAPPOINTED.... I'm using the Samsung gear vr.

developer_response.body:
Hi, 
This is weird. What device are you using? Sorry for the inconveniences!

Best regards!

Hi, I am waiting that Oculus upload some updates...I am waiting since last week...I hope soon new version was uploaded and all work good. 
Sorry for the inconvenience!

reviews.review_description:
Went black when i opened it. I couldn't even go to oculus menu, had to remove the phone.
Galaxy s9, Gear VR.
Edit: that was a quick reply, i hope you'll get it to work. I'll gladly try it out.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for share hte model and your problem. I will fix it ASAP. Sorry for the inconveniences!
